steps.title: Focus on the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize whose point of view the novel is told from. A successful sentence must name the novel Kaikeyi and make Kaikeyi's point of view the focus.

steps.title: Choose the sentence about point of view
steps.content: A focuses on The Ramayana, not the novel. B discusses heroic portrayal without naming the perspective. D only says that the epic poem features Kaikeyi. The sentence about the novel being a retelling from Kaikeyi's point of view directly matches the goal. The answer is C.
